# Vogue AI

> Vogue AI is a multilingual AI prompt gallery and image generator for creators who want reusable prompt ideas, visual references, and a practical generation workspace.

Updated: 2026-06-05

## Positioning

Vogue AI helps creators browse free AI image prompts, inspect visual references, copy reusable prompt structures, and generate images from the same workspace. The homepage is the main prompt-gallery surface. The `/app` route is the generation workspace.

## Primary User Flow

1. Browse prompt examples on the homepage.
2. Choose a prompt card or copy the prompt.
3. Open the generator workspace.
4. Select a model, aspect ratio, quality, and output resolution where available.
5. Generate and review the image result.

## Multilingual Strategy

Supported locales are English, Chinese, French, Russian, Portuguese, Japanese, and Korean. English is the default locale and is served without a required prefix. The actively sitemap-submitted localized public surfaces are:

- Home / prompt gallery: https://vogueai.net/
- Blog index: https://vogueai.net/blog
- Blog posts: https://vogueai.net/blog/copy-paste-ai-image-prompts

Localized URLs use the locale prefix, for example:

- https://vogueai.net/zh
- https://vogueai.net/zh/blog
- https://vogueai.net/zh/blog/copy-paste-ai-image-prompts

## Public Pages

- Home: https://vogueai.net/
- Generator Workspace: https://vogueai.net/app
- Blog: https://vogueai.net/blog
- AI Image Prompt: https://vogueai.net/ai-image-prompt
- GPT Image Prompt: https://vogueai.net/gpt-image-prompt
- Nano Banana Prompt: https://vogueai.net/nano-banana-prompt
- Midjourney Prompt: https://vogueai.net/midjourney-prompt
- AI Effects Collection: https://vogueai.net/effect
- AI Models Collection: https://vogueai.net/model
- Privacy Policy: https://vogueai.net/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://vogueai.net/terms-of-service

Privacy Policy and Terms of Service are English-only canonical pages. Locale-prefixed legal URLs redirect permanently to the English canonical URL.

## Pricing

Pricing is opened as an in-app dialog from the homepage and workspace navigation. The `/pricing` route redirects to the homepage pricing dialog and is not submitted as an SEO page.

## Preserved Single-Language SEO Pages

These pages remain online in English only to preserve historical search value and route visitors toward the current prompt-gallery and generator flow:

- https://vogueai.net/veo-3-generator
- https://vogueai.net/hailuo-ai-video-generator
- https://vogueai.net/seedance
- https://vogueai.net/lipsync
- https://vogueai.net/ai-baby-generator
- https://vogueai.net/ai-baby-podcast
- https://vogueai.net/earth-zoom

Locale-prefixed versions of these preserved SEO pages redirect permanently to their English canonical URLs.

## Indexing Policy

- `sitemap.xml` includes localized entries for the homepage, blog index, and localized blog posts.
- `sitemap.xml` includes one English canonical entry for each prompt SEO page, collection page, preserved single-language SEO page, selected prompt detail page, and legal page.
- Locale-prefixed URLs for preserved SEO pages and legal pages redirect with HTTP 301 to the English canonical URL.
- `/app`, `/assets`, `/profile`, `/billings`, `/login`, `/auth/*`, `/payment/*`, `/api/*`, and internal system paths are not submitted as SEO pages.
- `robots.txt` points crawlers to https://vogueai.net/sitemap.xml, allows required Next.js static resources, and disallows private, API, authentication, payment, and generated asset account surfaces.

## Current Product Summary

Vogue AI is a prompt-gallery and image-generator product. The most important public intent is free AI image prompt discovery for GPT Image 2, Nano Banana, Midjourney, product photos, posters, portraits, UI, social posts, and related visual workflows.
